concept.name: BackOrder
concept.enDisplayName: Product prescribed is on back order
concept.frDisplayName: Produit prescrit en rupture de stock
concept.description: Product prescribed is on back order

concept.name: NotAvailable
concept.enDisplayName: Product prescribed is not commercially available (default)
concept.description: Product prescribed is not commercially available (default)

concept.name: NotCovered
concept.enDisplayName: Product prescribed is not covered by patient’s insurance
concept.frDisplayName: Produit prescrit pas couvert par assurance du patient
concept.description: Product prescribed is not covered by patient’s insurance

concept.name: Other
concept.enDisplayName: Patient preference, Tapering dose, Other (with free text option)
concept.frDisplayName: Préférence du patient, diminution progressive, autre (texte libre)
concept.description: Patient preference, Tapering dose, Other (with free text option)
